description: The complete project file structure. Every file listed here is explained in detail later in this section.
code:
webdevguide/
  .github/
    workflows/
      ci.yml                        # GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline
  docker-compose.yml                # Production containers
  docker-compose.dev.yml            # Dev with volume mounts for hot reload

  backend/
    Dockerfile                      # Multi-stage Python build
    requirements.txt                # Flask, Flask-Cors, gunicorn
    entrypoint.py                   # Seeds DB then starts gunicorn
    app/
      __init__.py                   # App factory (create_app) + resolve_ref + seed-db CLI
      config.py                     # Dev/Testing/Prod config classes
      extensions.py                 # CORS initialization
      api/
        guide.py                    # Blueprint: /api/guide/* (sections, navigation)
        exam.py                     # Blueprint: /api/exam/* (questions, categories)
        glossary.py                 # Blueprint: /api/glossary/* (terms, search)
      services/
        guide_service.py            # Section queries (get_all, get_by_slug, navigation)
        exam_service.py             # Random sampling, category filtering
        glossary_service.py         # Term lookup, search, categories
      utils/
        db.py                       # JsonDatabase class + init_db + get_db
    seeds/
      data/
        index.json                  # Root $ref map: slug -> section file
        exam_questions.json         # All exam questions
        glossary_terms.json         # All glossary terms
        sections/
          getting-started.json      # One file per guide section
          fundamentals.json
          building-this-guide.json  # This very file
          ...                       # 30+ section files

  frontend/
    Dockerfile                      # Multi-stage Node.js build
    package.json                    # Next.js 15, React 19, MUI 6, Redux Toolkit
    next.config.ts                  # Next.js config with next-intl plugin
    src/
      app/
        layout.tsx                  # Root layout (html, body, metadata)
        [locale]/
          layout.tsx                # Locale layout (i18n, Store, Theme, Header, Footer)
          page.tsx                  # Home page
          getting-started/page.tsx  # One page.tsx per guide section
          building-this-guide/page.tsx
          exam/page.tsx
          glossary/page.tsx
          ...
      components/
        content/
          BlockRenderer.tsx         # Dispatcher: switches on block.type
          SectionRenderer.tsx       # Maps blocks to BlockRenderer
          GuidePageLayout.tsx       # Full page layout with title, chips, keypoints
          TextBlockRenderer.tsx     # Renders text blocks with markdown
          CodeBlockRenderer.tsx     # Syntax highlighting + copy button
          AlertBlockRenderer.tsx    # Info/warning/success/error callouts
          ListBlockRenderer.tsx     # Ordered and unordered lists
          StepBlockRenderer.tsx     # Numbered tutorial steps
          TabsBlockRenderer.tsx     # Tabbed content panels
          AccordionBlockRenderer.tsx # Expandable sections
          TableBlockRenderer.tsx    # Data tables
          CardGridBlockRenderer.tsx # Grid of feature cards
          KeyPointsList.tsx         # Summary points at bottom
        layout/
          Header.tsx                # Top navigation bar
          Footer.tsx                # Site footer
        common/
          BookmarkButton.tsx        # Add/remove bookmark
          LoadingSpinner.tsx        # Loading state
      store/
        store.ts                    # Redux store with persistence config
        hooks.ts                    # Typed useAppDispatch, useAppSelector
        StoreProvider.tsx           # PersistGate + Provider wrapper
        slices/
          themeSlice.ts             # Light/dark mode toggle
          guideSlice.ts             # Section fetching + currentSection
          examSlice.ts              # Exam state, scoring, history
          glossarySlice.ts          # Glossary terms + filtering
          bookmarkSlice.ts          # User bookmarks with notes
          progressSlice.ts          # Reading progress tracking
          generatorSlice.ts         # Code generator configuration
      lib/
        apiClient.ts                # Axios instance + guideApi, examApi, glossaryApi
      theme/
        theme.ts                    # getTheme(mode) factory
        palette.ts                  # Light and dark color palettes
        typography.ts               # Font configuration
        components.ts               # MUI component overrides
        ThemeRegistry.tsx           # CacheProvider + ThemeProvider + CssBaseline
      i18n/
        routing.ts                  # Locale definitions (en, localePrefix: as-needed)
        request.ts                  # Server-side locale loading
        navigation.ts               # Localized navigation helpers
      hooks/
        useHeader.ts                # Nav items + More menu groups
      messages/
        en.json                     # English translation strings
      types/
        content.ts                  # ContentBlock union type + GuideSectionContent
        exam.ts                     # ExamQuestion type
        guide.ts                    # GuideSection + GlossaryTerm types
